name: Refinitiv Eikon
description_short: LSEG's professional financial data platform (formerly Thomson Reuters) with real-time data, Reuters news, and advanced analytics — Bloomberg's primary competitor.
description_long:
Refinitiv Eikon (now part of the London Stock Exchange Group) is the second-largest professional financial data platform in the world, serving as the primary alternative to the Bloomberg Terminal. Formerly known as Thomson Reuters Eikon, the platform provides comprehensive real-time and historical market data, news, and analytical tools across all major asset classes.

Eikon covers equities, fixed income, forex, commodities, and derivatives with data from over 400 exchanges and OTC markets worldwide. The platform integrates Reuters News — one of the world's largest news organizations — providing real-time breaking news, analysis, and exclusive content. Eikon's Screener enables filtering across 90,000+ instruments using hundreds of criteria.

The platform features Datastream for long-term historical data and economic time series, StarMine for quantitative equity analytics, and the Eikon Excel Add-in for data extraction. LSEG's Workspace (the evolution of Eikon) adds AI-powered search, customizable dashboards, and improved collaboration tools. Pricing starts around $1,800/month, making it more accessible than Bloomberg while still firmly in the institutional category.
pros: Datastream offers 70+ years of historical data
Cleaner, more modern interface than Bloomberg
cons: Still very expensive for retail traders
Feature gap compared to Bloomberg in some areas
Transition from Eikon to Workspace has been rocky
Customer support quality varies by region
meta_description: Refinitiv Eikon: 4.5★ rated $1800/mo by LSEG. More affordable than Bloomberg Terminal with 70+ years of data & Reuters news. See full review today.
